creator: masaki@club.kyutech.ac.jp
text:
Currently net/nam is broken because of configure error.
I fixed Makefile, and now it seems OK[1].
I also added a patch(patch-random.cc) for running properly,
its concept was from ns-users mailing list[2].

Also I can take maintainership as it appears to
have been abandoned...

[1] http://redports.org/buildarchive/20120604131559-61677/
[2] http://www.isi.edu/nsnam/archive/ns-users/webarch/1999/msg02161.html
